title: Seizure follow-up

examination.text: Supports seizure-event and witness history, physical examination, ECG or metabolic context, EEG review, MRI review, recurrence after remission, and specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: Supports recurrence and specialist-assessment context for seizure follow-up; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports seizure-event and witness history, physical examination, ECG or metabolic context, EEG review, MRI review, recurrence after remission, and specialist assessment.

source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.7 — seizure assessment, EEG, and imaging

examination.text: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.
examination.rationale: Supports seizure-frequency and safety discussion for seizure follow-up; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports seizure frequency, adherence, alcohol or drug use, uncontrolled seizures, abnormal neurological findings, and clinician-documented risk and safety discussion.

source.title: Epilepsies in children, young people and adults

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 10.1.1–10.2.2 — epilepsy-related death and SUDEP risk

referral.text: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.
referral.rationale: Supports seizure-control, adverse-effect, adherence and medicine review for seizure follow-up; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports seizure-control and adverse-effect review, clinician-led medication and interaction review, antiseizure medication levels when indicated, care review, and pregnancy-related specialist review without mapping a dose.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Epilepsy type, event dates and descriptions, triggers, adherence, medicines, adverse effects, injuries, tests, safety and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for seizure follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
